title: Wella
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Wella.jpg]] |name=Wella |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 65|''Star Wars'' (1977) 65]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You mean this ''rock'' is supposed to be so dangerous?"
"That's what Dr. Wella says, Princess.|Leia Organa and Gemmer Sojan|}} [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Wella''' was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] stationed at [[Haven Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] [[3 ABY/Legends|three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. When [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Gemmer Sojan/Legends|Gemmer Sojan]] complained that a stone that he picked up at the now-abandoned [[Golrath Station]] was flashing strange lights, he and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hanc Thorben]] brought the stone to Doctor Wella for analysis. Wella used a machine to project the images given off by the rock, and they realized that the stone had recorded activity in the Rebel base on Golrath months before. Wella explained that the rock had absorbed light rays as it was heated, and when it cooled it released the rays, essentially playing back the recording. [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] realized that if the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] were to discover this peculiarity about Golrath, they could have discovered many Alliance secrets, and in response ordered two squads of Rebel fighters to destroy Golrath Station. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 65|''Star Wars'' (1977) 65]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 65}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Wella }} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Scientists]]
